allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>$null; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\nvm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); if \(Test-Path "node_modules\\next"\) { Write-Output "DEPS_READY" } else { Write-Output "NOT_READY" }; Get-ChildItem node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)

PowerShell(winget install --id Git.Git -e --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements --silent; "GIT_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; winget install --id GitHub.cli -e --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements --silent; "GH_EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE")
